_comment: Read-side registry of cross-run-by-design channels. runs_reader.read_jsonl(scope='cross-run-by-design') requires that cross_run_channel= argument names an entry here AND that the path is declared under that entry. Lockstep with lifecycle-init.sh STALE_ARTIFACTS is enforced by the cross_run_channel_exemption_pairing coherence rule. New channels added in their owner's PR — see plan delegated-drifting-spring.md decision 1.

fix-ledger.rationale: Authoritative append-only ledger of agent + lead fixes across runs. Persists across lifecycle-init (not in STALE_ARTIFACTS). Used by recurrence-detector.py for cross-run composite-identity grouping and by check-cross-artifact-consistency.py for run-id-scoped counts.

recurrence-candidates.rationale: Phase B recurrence-candidate snapshots; explicitly cross-run for trend analysis.

agent-spawn-log.rationale: Append-only log of agent spawn events; cross-run for lineage checks (e.g., skill-agent-gate.sh lineage validation).
